sentences.arabic: تَبْدَأُ مَرْيَمُ عَمَلَهَا فِي الْمَكْتَبِ فِي السَّاعَةِ الثَّامِنَةِ صَبَاحًا.
sentences.translation: Merjem počinje svoj rad u kancelariji u osam sati ujutro.
sentences.translationEn: Maryam starts her work in the office at eight in the morning.

sentences.arabic: تُنَظِّمُ مَهَامَّهَا فِي قَائِمَةٍ يَوْمِيَّةٍ لِتَزِيدَ مِنْ إِنْتَاجِيَّتِهَا.
sentences.translation: Ona organizuje svoje zadatke na dnevnoj listi kako bi povećala svoju produktivnost.
sentences.translationEn: She organizes her tasks on a daily list to increase her productivity.

sentences.arabic: تَشْرَبُ الْقَهْوَةَ مَعَ زُمَلَائِهَا خِلَالَ الِاسْتِرَاحَةِ الْقَصِيرَةِ.
sentences.translation: Pije kafu sa svojim kolegama tokom kratke pauze.
sentences.translationEn: She drinks coffee with her colleagues during the short break.

sentences.arabic: تُنْهِي عَمَلَهَا وَتَعُودُ إِلَى الْبَيْتِ وَهِيَ تَشْعُرُ بِالرِّضَا.
sentences.translation: Završava svoj posao i vraća se kući osjećajući se zadovoljno.
sentences.translationEn: She finishes her work and returns home feeling satisfied.
